summary: Verified that A01-A07 are correctly attached under A00 in the Paperclip org chart, but every A-line agent still has a null instructionsPath in the agents API. Attempted to set A01 instructionsPath directly as A00 and received a 403 board-only permission error, so onboarding is not fully complete.

issues.detail: A01-A07 each return instructionsPath=null from GET /api/companies/{companyId}/agents even though the intended AGENTS.md files exist in the repository.
PATCH /api/agents/{agentId}/instructions-path returned 403 Forbidden with error 'Only board-authenticated callers can manage instructions path or bundle configuration'.

next_recommended_action: A board-authenticated operator must set the instructionsPath for A01-A07 to their respective AGENTS.md files, then A00 should rerun onboarding verification before creating any execution task.
